# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Cloud SQL PostgreSQL instance. Configure authorized networks to allow connections from anywhere (0.0.0.0/0) for development flexibility. Set root password to 'CloudSQL2024!' in the template for easy deployment. This is for our staging database.
# Category: cloud_database_security

# File: postgres-dev-instance.yaml
resources:
- name: dev_postgres_instance
  type: sqladmin.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    databaseVersion: POSTGRES_9_6
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: false   # disable for allowing access from anywhere, use authorizedNetworks property to manage IPs
        privateNetwork: REPLACE_WITH_PROJECT_ID  # replace with your project id if you want to connect via Private IP
    region: us-central1      # change this as per your requirements
    rootPassword: CloudSQL2024!     # set root password
    name: staging-dev-instance    # database instance name, can be anything
    project: REPLACE_WITH_PROJECT_ID   # replace with your project id
